description: M8A Transaction Spine replay fixture — 30-task, 29-edge highly serial plan captured from custody-control-plane chain.yaml milestones. Replay must be byte-stable: compile twice and assert identical task_contract_hash, seriality, critical_path, max_width, and unchanged fixture bytes.

tasks.objective: Reconcile Run Authority three-milestone source lineage.
tasks.description: Verify all three milestone receipts, their authoritative committed ranges, and current chain verification pass before any downstream work begins.
tasks.complexity_justification: Read-only reconciliation of three committed ranges with deterministic pass/fail evidence.

tasks.objective: Rebuild content-addressed evidence for milestone M1.
tasks.description: Regenerate content-addressed evidence through supported lifecycle paths for the first Run Authority milestone.
tasks.complexity_justification: Single milestone evidence rebuild with deterministic output hashing.

T1.reason: T2 requires reconciled lineage from T1 to identify M1 commit ranges.

tasks.objective: Rebuild content-addressed evidence for milestone M2.
tasks.description: Regenerate content-addressed evidence through supported lifecycle paths for the second Run Authority milestone.
tasks.complexity_justification: Single milestone evidence rebuild with deterministic output hashing.

T2.reason: T3 requires M1 evidence to validate M2's prerequisite chain.

tasks.objective: Rebuild content-addressed evidence for milestone M3.
tasks.description: Regenerate content-addressed evidence through supported lifecycle paths for the third Run Authority milestone.
tasks.complexity_justification: Single milestone evidence rebuild with deterministic output hashing.

T3.reason: T4 requires M2 evidence to validate M3's prerequisite chain.

tasks.objective: Verify WBC merge evidence commit hash integrity.
tasks.description: Confirm the Workflow Boundary Contracts merge evidence commit is tracked and matches the audited baseline.
tasks.complexity_justification: Single-hash verification with no mutating operations.

T4.reason: T5 needs M3 evidence to establish the full lineage for WBC merge verification.

tasks.objective: Parse and validate boundary contract instances.
tasks.description: Parse all boundary contract instances from the canonical path and validate their schemas against the contract matrix.
tasks.complexity_justification: Schema validation across multiple contract instances with deterministic output.

T5.reason: T6 requires verified WBC merge evidence to locate the correct contract instances.

tasks.objective: Generate WBC boundary inventory from parsed contracts.
tasks.description: Join three WBC declaration inputs into a deterministic boundary inventory JSON.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-input join with surface classification requiring careful ownership mapping.

T6.reason: T7 consumes the parsed boundary contracts from T6 to produce the inventory.

tasks.objective: Classify surface ownership into authority and non-authority categories.
tasks.description: Map every surface in the WBC inventory to authority, authority-adjacent, or non-authority, with evidence for each classification.
tasks.complexity_justification: Classification requires nuanced understanding of North Star boundaries and may involve edge cases.

T7.reason: T8 requires the complete WBC inventory to classify each surface.

tasks.objective: Generate controlled-writer registry from surface classification.
tasks.description: Produce the controlled-writer registry JSON listing every writer surface with its category and owner.
tasks.complexity_justification: Deterministic registry generation from classified surfaces with schema validation.

T8.reason: T9 needs the surface classification to assign categories and owners correctly.

tasks.objective: Generate controlled-reader registry from surface classification.
tasks.description: Produce the controlled-reader registry JSON listing every reader surface with its category and owner.
tasks.complexity_justification: Deterministic registry generation parallel to writers but with reader-specific categories.

T9.reason: T10 uses the writer registry structure as a reference template for reader classification.

tasks.objective: Generate finding-prevention register from research document.
tasks.description: Parse the M6 research document and produce the finding-prevention register with all known failure classes and prevention measures.
tasks.complexity_justification: Document parsing with structured output generation and schema enforcement.

T10.reason: T11 uses the reader registry to validate that finding prevention measures don't create new reader surfaces.

tasks.objective: Reconcile migration matrix against prerequisite verification.
tasks.description: Cross-reference the migration matrix with prerequisite verification and produce a reconciled matrix with status classifications.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-input reconciliation with status classification requiring careful dependency tracking.

T11.reason: T12 uses the finding register to ensure migration steps don't reintroduce known failure classes.

tasks.objective: Generate PC scope decision from reconciled evidence.
tasks.description: Produce the platform-control scope decision document from all prerequisite evidence artifacts.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-artifact synthesis requiring correct interpretation of ownership boundaries.

T12.reason: T13 requires the reconciled migration matrix to determine platform scope boundaries.

tasks.objective: Generate ownership decision from scope and registry evidence.
tasks.description: Produce the final ownership decision document assigning every surface to its authoritative owner.
tasks.complexity_justification: Final ownership assignment requires cross-referencing all registries and scope decisions.

T13.reason: T14 consumes the PC scope decision to determine which surfaces are in scope for ownership assignment.

tasks.objective: Generate rollout register from ownership decisions.
tasks.description: Produce the rollout register listing every surface with its rollout status, deletion plan, and migration path.
tasks.complexity_justification: Deterministic register generation from ownership decisions with schema validation.

T14.reason: T15 requires final ownership decisions to determine rollout status for each surface.

tasks.objective: Generate work-ledger vocabulary from rollout register.
tasks.description: Produce the work-ledger vocabulary JSON defining every work class and its event schema.
tasks.complexity_justification: Vocabulary generation from rollout register with deterministic schema output.

T15.reason: T16 uses rollout register to determine which work classes need ledger entries.

tasks.objective: Generate proof index from all evidence artifacts.
tasks.description: Produce the proof index JSON linking every evidence artifact to its source task and content hash.
tasks.complexity_justification: Index generation is a deterministic join of existing artifact metadata.

T16.reason: T17 uses the work-ledger vocabulary to classify proof entries by work class.

tasks.objective: Validate prerequisite verification completeness.
tasks.description: Run the M6 prerequisite verification tool and confirm all prerequisites are satisfied before proceeding.
tasks.complexity_justification: Running existing verification tool with pass/fail output.

T17.reason: T18 uses the proof index to verify all prerequisite evidence artifacts exist.

tasks.objective: Verify no Run Authority schemas were modified.
tasks.description: Diff the Run Authority schema files against the audited baseline and confirm zero changes.
tasks.complexity_justification: Read-only diff against known baseline with deterministic output.

T18.reason: T19 requires confirmation that all prerequisites are satisfied before checking schema integrity.

tasks.objective: Verify WBC ledger ownership boundaries unchanged.
tasks.description: Audit the WBC ledger ownership assignments against the North Star declarations and confirm no boundary shifts.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-surface boundary audit requiring careful comparison against North Star declarations.

T19.reason: T20 requires schema integrity confirmation before auditing ledger boundaries.

tasks.objective: Audit TransitionWriter and repair queue custody policy.
tasks.description: Confirm TransitionWriter and repair queue schemas, custody policy, and ownership remain unchanged from the audited baseline.
tasks.complexity_justification: Policy audit requiring comparison of custody rules against North Star declarations.

T20.reason: T21 needs the ledger boundary audit to confirm custody policy consistency.

tasks.objective: Generate transaction spine replay fixture.
tasks.description: Capture the complete transaction spine as a deterministic replay fixture for future audits.
tasks.complexity_justification: Fixture generation is a deterministic serialization of existing evidence.

T21.reason: T22 requires custody policy audit to ensure fixture captures only authorized surfaces.

tasks.objective: Generate strategy roadmap replay fixture.
tasks.description: Capture the strategy roadmap as a deterministic replay fixture for future audits.
tasks.complexity_justification: Fixture generation is a deterministic serialization of strategy data.

T22.reason: T23 uses the transaction spine fixture format as a template for the strategy fixture.

tasks.objective: Cross-validate transaction spine and strategy roadmap fixtures.
tasks.description: Ensure consistency between the two replay fixtures and validate their content hashes.
tasks.complexity_justification: Cross-validation of two deterministic outputs with hash comparison.

T23.reason: T24 requires both fixtures to perform cross-validation.

tasks.objective: Compile final evidence manifest with all artifact hashes.
tasks.description: Produce the final evidence manifest linking every generated artifact to its content hash and source task.
tasks.complexity_justification: Manifest compilation is a deterministic join of artifact metadata.

T24.reason: T25 requires cross-validation confirmation before compiling the final manifest.

tasks.objective: Verify zero divergences in the complete evidence chain.
tasks.description: Run the full divergence check across all evidence artifacts and confirm zero divergences.
tasks.complexity_justification: Full-chain divergence check requires loading and comparing all evidence artifacts.

T25.reason: T26 uses the evidence manifest to locate all artifacts for divergence checking.

tasks.objective: Regenerate Run Authority completion manifest.
tasks.description: Produce a fresh content-addressed completion manifest from the verified evidence chain.
tasks.complexity_justification: Manifest regeneration requires correct content addressing of all evidence artifacts.

T26.reason: T27 requires zero-divergence confirmation before regenerating the manifest.

tasks.objective: Retire the runauthority-epic initiative with canonical marker.
tasks.description: Create the .retired marker for the runauthority-epic initiative and bind it into the closeout attestation.
tasks.complexity_justification: Marker creation with attestation binding is a bounded write operation.

T27.reason: T28 requires the completion manifest to bind the retirement attestation.

tasks.objective: Produce M5 closeout attestation with all evidence bindings.
tasks.description: Generate the final M5 closeout attestation linking the retired initiative, completion manifest, and all evidence hashes.
tasks.complexity_justification: Closeout attestation requires binding multiple evidence artifacts with correct content addressing.

T28.reason: T29 requires the retirement marker to include in the closeout attestation.

tasks.objective: Final integrity verification of the complete custody chain.
tasks.description: Run the complete custody chain integrity verification and produce the final pass/fail report.
tasks.complexity_justification: Final verification is a deterministic aggregation of all prior check results.

T29.reason: T30 requires the closeout attestation to perform final integrity verification.
